edits.slides.4.description: Two ways to rebuild the editor: give doctors everything, or get out of their way.
edits.slides.4.dir1Desc: A maximal builder: an Add Section menu of eight block types — Before/After, Summary, Prescription, Patient Instructions and more — with annotation and notes inline on every image. Complete, but more interface to manage.
edits.slides.4.dir2Desc: The streamlined one. Metadata and actions collapse into a compact top strip; procedure templates and a simple section list drive a clean canvas. Fewer choices, less to manage — the doctor focuses on the report.
